json_data.title: Self-Correction in LLM Agents
json_data.reason: Understanding how agents identify and fix errors using observations is a natural extension of ReAct's feedback loop and directly relates to how memory is updated to improve future performance.

json_data.title: Continual Learning for LLM Agents
json_data.reason: This topic explores how agents can continuously acquire new knowledge and skills from their interactions and observations without forgetting past learning, which is a core challenge for sophisticated ReAct systems.

json_data.title: Long-Term Episodic Memory Architectures for AI Agents
json_data.reason: Designing memory systems that allow agents to recall specific past experiences, learn from them over extended periods, and apply contextual knowledge to new situations is crucial for truly intelligent and adaptable ReAct-like systems in complex environments.
